schema.description: A cooking assistant that provides detailed recipes, category browsing, personalized meal recommendations, and random dish suggestions based on the number of diners.

tools.name: get_recipe_details
tools.description: Retrieve full details for a specific recipe by its unique identifier.

recipe_id.description: The unique identifier of the recipe whose details are to be fetched.
The unique identifier of the recipe.

name.description: The display name of the recipe.

description.description: A short summary describing the dish.

category.description: The category to which the recipe belongs (e.g., 水产, 早餐, 荤菜, 主食).

ingredients.description: List of ingredient objects required for the recipe.

tips.description: Helpful cooking tips or variations for the recipe.

tools.name: list_all_categories
tools.description: List all available categories of recipes.

categories.description: List of all category names available in the recipe collection.

tools.name: list_recipes_by_category
tools.description: List all recipes belonging to a specific category.

category.description: The category name (e.g., 水产, 早餐, 荤菜, 主食) to filter recipes; omit to retrieve all recipes.

recipe_id.description: The unique identifier of the recipe.

name.description: The display name of the recipe.

description.description: A short summary describing the dish.

recipes.description: List of recipes matching the specified category.

tools.name: recommend_meal
tools.description: Generate a personalized meal recipe based on the number of diners, preferred category, and ingredients to avoid.

people_count.description: The number of people to cook for (range 1-10).

category.description: The preferred category name (e.g., 水产, 早餐, 荤菜, 主食) to narrow recommendations; omit for any category.

avoid_items.description: List of ingredient names to exclude from the recommended recipe.

recipe_id.description: The unique identifier of the recommended recipe.

name.description: The display name of the recommended recipe.

description.description: A short summary describing the dish.

category.description: The category to which the recipe belongs (e.g., 水产, 早餐, 荤菜, 主食).

ingredients.description: List of ingredient objects required for the recipe.

tips.description: Helpful cooking tips or variations for the recipe.

tools.name: get_random_dish_recommendation
tools.description: Get a random combination of dishes suitable for the specified number of diners.

people_count.description: The number of people to dine (range 1-10).

recipe_id.description: The unique identifier of the recommended recipe.

name.description: The display name of the recommended recipe.

description.description: A short summary describing the dish.

category.description: The category to which the recipe belongs (e.g., 水产, 早餐, 荤菜, 主食).

ingredients.description: List of ingredient objects required for the recipe.

tips.description: Helpful cooking tips or variations for the recipe.

scenarios.description: Basic scenario with one simple recipe

pasta_001.name: Simple Pasta
steps: Boil water and cook pasta according to package instructions
Heat tomato sauce in a separate pan
Drain pasta and mix with sauce
tips: Add a pinch of salt to the pasta water

scenarios.description: Multiple recipes across different categories with varied complexity

omelette_001.name: French Omelette
steps: Beat eggs with salt until frothy
Heat butter in non-stick pan over medium heat
Pour eggs into pan and cook without stirring for 1 minute
Fold omelette in half and serve immediately
tips: Use room temperature eggs for better texture
Don't overcook - eggs should be slightly runny

brownies_001.name: Fudgy Brownies
brownies_001.description: Rich chocolate brownies with fudgy center
steps: Melt chocolate and butter together
Mix in sugar and eggs
Fold in flour gently
Bake at 180°C for 25 minutes

scenarios.description: Comprehensive recipe collection with multiple categories and detailed recipes

risotto_001.name: Mushroom Risotto
risotto_001.description: Creamy Italian rice dish with mushrooms
steps: Sauté mushrooms in olive oil until browned
Add rice and toast for 1 minute
Add broth gradually, stirring constantly
Cook until rice is al dente
Stir in parmesan cheese and serve

smoothie_001.name: Berry Smoothie
smoothie_001.description: Healthy breakfast smoothie with mixed berries
steps: Add all ingredients to blender
Blend until smooth
Serve immediately
tips: Use frozen berries for thicker smoothie

curry_001.name: Chicken Curry
steps: Sauté onions until translucent
Add chicken and brown on all sides
Add curry powder and cook for 1 minute
Pour in coconut milk and simmer for 20 minutes

scenarios.description: Empty recipe collection with only categories defined
